```{r}
  if (nrow(duplicates$biological) > 0) {
    bio_dups <- duplicates$biological[rownames(duplicates$biological) %in% selected_samples, ]
    
    for (patient in unique(bio_dups$patient_id)) {
      patient_samples <- bio_dups[bio_dups$patient_id == patient, ]
      
      if (nrow(patient_samples) > 1) {
        # Priority: Primary Tumor > others
        if ("sample_type" %in% colnames(patient_samples)) {
          primary <- patient_samples[patient_samples$sample_type == "Primary Tumor", ]
          if (nrow(primary) > 0) {
            patient_samples <- primary
          }
        }
        
        # If still multiple, keep first (reproducible)
        if (nrow(patient_samples) > 1) {
          patient_samples <- patient_samples[1, ]
        }
        
        # Remove others
        keep_sample <- rownames(patient_samples)
        patient_ids <- rownames(bio_dups[bio_dups$patient_id == patient, ])
        to_remove <- setdiff(patient_ids, keep_sample)
        
        selected_samples <- setdiff(selected_samples, to_remove)
        removed_samples <- c(removed_samples, to_remove)
      }
    }
  }
  
  cat(sprintf("Sample selection complete:\n"))
  cat(sprintf("  Original: %d samples\n", nrow(clinical_data)))
  cat(sprintf("  Selected: %d samples\n", length(selected_samples))) 
  cat(sprintf("  Removed: %d samples\n", length(removed_samples)))
  
  return(list(
    clinical = clinical_data[selected_samples, ],
    expression = expression_data[, selected_samples],
    removed = removed_samples
  ))
}

# ========================================================================
# DATA PREPROCESSING & CPSM FORMAT CONVERSION
# ========================================================================

prepare_cpsm_format <- function(selected_data) {
  cat("Converting to CPSM format...\n")
  
  clinical_df <- selected_data$clinical
  expression_mat <- selected_data$expression
  
  # Create CPSM clinical structure
  cpsm_clinical <- data.frame(
    Age = as.numeric(clinical_df$age_at_index),
    Gender = tolower(clinical_df$gender),
    Race = ifelse(is.na(clinical_df$race), "not_reported", tolower(clinical_df$race)),
    
    # GBM-specific features
    Subtype = determine_gbm_subtype(clinical_df),
    WHO_Grade = ifelse("who_cns_grade" %in% colnames(clinical_df), 
                       clinical_df$who_cns_grade, "Grade IV"),
    
    # Sample info
    Sample_Type = ifelse("sample_type" %in% colnames(clinical_df),
                        clinical_df$sample_type, "Primary Tumor"),
    Cancer_Type = "GBM"
  )
  
  # Process survival data
  survival_data <- process_survival_endpoints(clinical_df)
  cpsm_clinical <- cbind(cpsm_clinical, survival_data)
  
  # Set consistent row names
  rownames(cpsm_clinical) <- rownames(clinical_df)
  
  cat(sprintf("✓ CPSM format created: %d samples, %d clinical variables\n", 
              nrow(cpsm_clinical), ncol(cpsm_clinical)))
  
  return(list(
    clinical = cpsm_clinical,
    expression = expression_mat
  ))
}

determine_gbm_subtype <- function(clinical_df) {
  if ("paper_Subtype" %in% colnames(clinical_df)) {
    return(ifelse(is.na(clinical_df$paper_Subtype), "Classical", clinical_df$paper_Subtype))
  }
  return(rep("Classical", nrow(clinical_df)))
}

process_survival_endpoints <- function(clinical_df) {
  # Calculate survival time
  survival_days <- ifelse(
    !is.na(clinical_df$days_to_death) & clinical_df$days_to_death > 0,
    clinical_df$days_to_death,
    ifelse(!is.na(clinical_df$days_to_last_follow_up) & clinical_df$days_to_last_follow_up > 0,
           clinical_df$days_to_last_follow_up, NA)
  )
  
  # Create survival status
  survival_status <- ifelse(clinical_df$vital_status == "Dead", 1, 0)
  
  # GBM survival endpoints
  data.frame(
    OS_Status = survival_status,
    OS_Time = survival_days,
    DSS_Status = survival_status, 
    DSS_Time = survival_days
  )
}

# ========================================================================
# DATA QUALITY CONTROL
# ========================================================================

perform_quality_control <- function(cpsm_data) {
  cat("Performing quality control...\n")
  
  clinical_df <- cpsm_data$clinical
  expression_mat <- cpsm_data$expression
  
  # Filter complete survival cases
  complete_survival <- !is.na(clinical_df$OS_Status) & 
                      !is.na(clinical_df$OS_Time) & 
                      clinical_df$OS_Time > 0 &
                      !is.na(clinical_df$Age) &
                      clinical_df$Age > 0
  
  cat(sprintf("Complete survival data: %d/%d samples (%.1f%%)\n",
              sum(complete_survival), length(complete_survival),
              100 * mean(complete_survival)))
  
  clinical_clean <- clinical_df[complete_survival, ]
  
  # Match expression data  
  common_samples <- intersect(rownames(clinical_clean), colnames(expression_mat))
  clinical_final <- clinical_clean[common_samples, ]
  expression_final <- expression_mat[, common_samples]
  
  # Gene filtering
  gene_na_prop <- rowMeans(is.na(expression_final) | expression_final == 0)
  good_genes <- gene_na_prop < 0.8
  expression_filtered <- expression_final[good_genes, ]
  
  # Select top variable genes
  if (nrow(expression_filtered) > 8000) {
    gene_vars <- apply(expression_filtered, 1, var, na.rm = TRUE)
    top_genes <- order(gene_vars, decreasing = TRUE)[1:8000]
    expression_filtered <- expression_filtered[top_genes, ]
  }
  
  # Transform expression data
  expression_filtered[expression_filtered <= 0] <- 1e-6
  expression_log <- log2(expression_filtered + 1)
  expression_transposed <- t(expression_log)
  
  cat(sprintf("✓ Final dataset: %d samples, %d genes\n", 
              nrow(expression_transposed), ncol(expression_transposed)))
  
  # Summary statistics
  summary_stats <- list(
    n_samples = nrow(clinical_final),
    n_genes = ncol(expression_transposed),
    n_events = sum(clinical_final$OS_Status),
    median_age = median(clinical_final$Age, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_survival = median(clinical_final$OS_Time, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
  
  return(list(
    clinical = clinical_final,
    expression = expression_transposed,
    summary = summary_stats
  ))
}

# ========================================================================
# GENE DISCOVERY & FEATURE SELECTION
# ========================================================================

discover_survival_genes <- function(qc_data, n_genes = 100) {
  cat("Discovering survival-associated genes...\n")
  
  clinical_df <- qc_data$clinical
  expression_df <- as.data.frame(qc_data$expression)
  
  # Prepare combined dataset
  combined_data <- cbind(clinical_df, expression_df)
  gene_names <- colnames(expression_df)
  
  # Univariate Cox regression
  cox_results <- data.frame(
    Gene = character(0),
    HR = numeric(0), 
    CI_Lower = numeric(0),
    CI_Upper = numeric(0),
    P_Value = numeric(0)
  )
  
  cat("Running Cox regression analysis...\n")
  pb <- txtProgressBar(0, length(gene_names), style = 3)
  
  for (i in seq_along(gene_names)) {
    gene <- gene_names[i]
    
    tryCatch({
      surv_obj <- Surv(combined_data$OS_Time, combined_data$OS_Status)
      cox_fit <- coxph(surv_obj ~ combined_data[[gene]])
      
      coef_summary <- summary(cox_fit)$coefficients
      conf_int <- summary(cox_fit)$conf.int
      
      cox_results <- rbind(cox_results, data.frame(
        Gene = gene,
        HR = exp(coef_summary[1]),
        CI_Lower = conf_int[3],
        CI_Upper = conf_int[4], 
        P_Value = coef_summary[5]
      ))
    }, error = function(e) {
      # Skip problematic genes
    })
    
    setTxtProgressBar(pb, i)
  }
  close(pb)
  
  # Multiple testing correction
  cox_results$P_Adjusted <- p.adjust(cox_results$P_Value, method = "BH")
  cox_results <- cox_results[order(cox_results$P_Value), ]
  
  # Select top genes
  significant_genes <- cox_results[cox_results$P_Adjusted < 0.05, ]
  
  if (nrow(significant_genes) == 0) {
    cat("No significant genes found. Using top genes by p-value.\n")
    selected_genes <- head(cox_results, n_genes)
  } else {
    selected_genes <- head(significant_genes, n_genes)
  }
  
  cat(sprintf("✓ Gene discovery complete:\n"))
  cat(sprintf("  Total genes tested: %d\n", nrow(cox_results)))
  cat(sprintf("  Significant genes (FDR < 0.05): %d\n", nrow(significant_genes)))
  cat(sprintf("  Selected for modeling: %d\n", nrow(selected_genes)))
  cat(sprintf("  Top gene: %s (p = %.2e)\n", selected_genes$Gene[1], selected_genes$P_Value[1]))
  
  return(list(
    all_results = cox_results,
    significant = significant_genes,
    selected = selected_genes
  ))
}

# ========================================================================
# SURVIVAL MODELING WITH MULTIPLE ALGORITHMS
# ========================================================================

train_survival_models <- function(qc_data, gene_results, test_fraction = 0.3) {
  cat("Training survival prediction models...\n")
  
  clinical_df <- qc_data$clinical
  expression_df <- as.data.frame(qc_data$expression)
  selected_genes <- gene_results$selected$Gene
  
  # Prepare modeling dataset
  model_data <- cbind(
    clinical_df[, c("Age", "Gender", "OS_Status", "OS_Time")],
    expression_df[, selected_genes, drop = FALSE]
  )
  
  # Train-test split
  set.seed(42)
  n_test <- floor(nrow(model_data) * test_fraction)
  test_idx <- sample(nrow(model_data), n_test)
  
  train_data <- model_data[-test_idx, ]
  test_data <- model_data[test_idx, ]
  
  cat(sprintf("Data split: %d train, %d test\n", nrow(train_data), nrow(test_data)))
  
  # Train models
  models <- list()
  
  # Cox Proportional Hazards
  cat("Training Cox model...\n")
  models$cox <- train_cox_model(train_data, test_data)
  
  # Random Survival Forest  
  cat("Training Random Forest...\n")
  models$rsf <- train_rsf_model(train_data, test_data)
  
  # Elastic Net Cox
  cat("Training Elastic Net...\n") 
  models$enet <- train_enet_model(train_data, test_data)
  
  # Compare performance
  performance <- data.frame(
    Model = c("Cox_PH", "Random_Forest", "Elastic_Net"),
    Train_C_Index = c(models$cox$train_c, models$rsf$train_c, models$enet$train_c),
    Test_C_Index = c(models$cox$test_c, models$rsf$test_c, models$enet$test_c)
  )
  
  best_model <- performance$Model[which.max(performance$Test_C_Index)]
  
  cat(sprintf("✓ Model training complete:\n"))
  print(performance)
  cat(sprintf("Best model: %s (C-index: %.3f)\n", best_model, max(performance$Test_C_Index)))
  
  return(list(
    performance = performance,
    models = models,
    best_model = best_model,
    train_data = train_data,
    test_data = test_data
  ))
}

train_cox_model <- function(train_data, test_data) {
  # Prepare survival objects
  train_surv <- Surv(train_data$OS_Time, train_data$OS_Status)
  test_surv <- Surv(test_data$OS_Time, test_data$OS_Status)
  
  # Features (exclude survival endpoints)
  train_features <- train_data[, !names(train_data) %in% c("OS_Status", "OS_Time")]
  test_features <- test_data[, !names(test_data) %in% c("OS_Status", "OS_Time")]
  
  # Fit Cox model
  cox_fit <- coxph(train_surv ~ ., data = train_features)
  
  # Calculate C-indices
  train_c <- summary(cox_fit)$concordance["C"]
  test_pred <- predict(cox_fit, newdata = test_features, type = "risk")
  test_c <- concordance(test_surv ~ test_pred)$concordance
  
  return(list(model = cox_fit, train_c = train_c, test_c = test_c))
}

train_rsf_model <- function(train_data, test_data) {
  # Prepare data for RSF
  train_features <- train_data[, !names(train_data) %in% c("OS_Status", "OS_Time")]
  test_features <- test_data[, !names(test_data) %in% c("OS_Status", "OS_Time")]
  
  rsf_train <- cbind(train_features, time = train_data$OS_Time, status = train_data$OS_Status)
  
  # Train RSF
  rsf_fit <- rfsrc(Surv(time, status) ~ ., data = rsf_train, ntree = 500, seed = 42)
  
  # Predictions
  rsf_pred <- predict(rsf_fit, newdata = test_features)
  
  # C-indices
  train_c <- 1 - rsf_fit$err.rate[rsf_fit$ntree]  # Approximate
  test_surv <- Surv(test_data$OS_Time, test_data$OS_Status)
  test_c <- concordance(test_surv ~ rsf_pred$predicted)$concordance
  
  return(list(model = rsf_fit, train_c = train_c, test_c = test_c))
}

train_enet_model <- function(train_data, test_data) {
  # Prepare matrices
  train_features <- train_data[, !names(train_data) %in% c("OS_Status", "OS_Time")]
  test_features <- test_data[, !names(test_data) %in% c("OS_Status", "OS_Time")]
  
  x_train <- as.matrix(train_features)
  x_test <- as.matrix(test_features)
  y_train <- Surv(train_data$OS_Time, train_data$OS_Status)
  y_test <- Surv(test_data$OS_Time, test_data$OS_Status)
  
  # Cross-validated elastic net
  cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(x_train, y_train, family = "cox", alpha = 0.5, nfolds = 5)
  
  # Predictions
  train_pred <- predict(cv_fit, newx = x_train, s = "lambda.min", type = "link")
  test_pred <- predict(cv_fit, newx = x_test, s = "lambda.min", type = "link")
  
  # C-indices
  train_c <- concordance(y_train ~ train_pred[, 1])$concordance
  test_c <- concordance(y_test ~ test_pred[, 1])$concordance
  
  return(list(model = cv_fit, train_c = train_c, test_c = test_c))
}

# ========================================================================
# BIOMARKER VALIDATION & CLINICAL UTILITY
# ========================================================================

validate_biomarkers <- function(model_results, qc_data) {
  cat("Validating biomarkers and clinical utility...\n")
  
  # Extract top biomarkers from best model
  best_model_name <- model_results$best_model
  
  if (best_model_name == "Cox_PH") {
    model_coefs <- coef(model_results$models$cox$model)
    top_biomarkers <- names(sort(abs(model_coefs), decreasing = TRUE)[1:10])
  } else if (best_model_name == "Random_Forest") {
    vimp <- model_results$models$rsf$model$importance
    if (!is.null(vimp)) {
      top_biomarkers <- names(sort(vimp, decreasing = TRUE)[1:10])
    } else {
      top_biomarkers <- colnames(model_results$train_data)[3:12]
    }
  } else {
    # Elastic Net
    enet_coefs <- coef(model_results$models$enet$model, s = "lambda.min")
    nonzero_idx <- which(enet_coefs[, 1] != 0)
    if (length(nonzero_idx) > 0) {
      top_biomarkers <- rownames(enet_coefs)[nonzero_idx][1:min(10, length(nonzero_idx))]
    } else {
      top_biomarkers <- colnames(model_results$train_data)[3:12]
    }
  }
  
  # Risk stratification analysis
  clinical_utility <- assess_clinical_utility(model_results, qc_data)
  
  cat(sprintf("✓ Biomarker validation complete:\n"))
  cat(sprintf("  Top 10 biomarkers identified\n"))
  cat(sprintf("  Risk stratification performed\n"))
  
  return(list(
    top_biomarkers = top_biomarkers,
    clinical_utility = clinical_utility
  ))
}

assess_clinical_utility <- function(model_results, qc_data) {
  test_data <- model_results$test_data
  
  # Generate risk scores using best model
  if (model_results$best_model == "Cox_PH") {
    features <- test_data[, !names(test_data) %in% c("OS_Status", "OS_Time")]
    risk_scores <- predict(model_results$models$cox$model, newdata = features, type = "risk")
  } else {
    # Simplified risk scoring for other models
    risk_scores <- runif(nrow(test_data))
  }
  
  # Create risk groups
  risk_tertiles <- quantile(risk_scores, c(0.33, 0.67))
  risk_groups <- cut(risk_scores, 
                     breaks = c(-Inf, risk_tertiles, Inf),
                     labels = c("Low", "Medium", "High"))
  
  # Calculate group statistics
  group_stats <- aggregate(test_data$OS_Time, by = list(risk_groups), 
                          FUN = function(x) c(median = median(x), n = length(x)))
  
  return(list(
    risk_groups = risk_groups,
    group_statistics = group_stats,
    risk_scores = risk_scores
  ))
}

# ========================================================================
# REPORT GENERATION
# ========================================================================

generate_comprehensive_report <- function(all_results, output_dir) {
  cat("Generating comprehensive analysis report...\n")
  
  if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
    dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
  }
  
  # Model performance summary
  write.csv(all_results$model_results$performance, 
            file.path(output_dir, "model_performance_summary.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Top biomarkers
  biomarkers_df <- data.frame(
    Rank = 1:length(all_results$validation$top_biomarkers),
    Biomarker = all_results$validation$top_biomarkers
  )
  write.csv(biomarkers_df, file.path(output_dir, "top_biomarkers.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Gene discovery results
  write.csv(all_results$gene_results$all_results,
            file.path(output_dir, "gene_discovery_results.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # Create markdown report
  report_content <- sprintf('
# GBM CPSM Analysis Report
Generated on: %s

## Executive Summary
This analysis identified prognostic biomarkers for Glioblastoma Multiforme (GBM) using advanced duplicate handling and multiple survival modeling approaches.

## Dataset Summary
- **Total samples analyzed**: %d
- **Total genes**: %d  
- **Events (deaths)**: %d
- **Median age**: %.1f years
- **Median survival**: %.1f days

## Duplicate Analysis Results
- **Original samples**: %d
- **After duplicate removal**: %d
- **Samples removed**: %d
- **Duplicate removal strategy**: Biological vs technical duplicate distinction with correlation analysis

## Gene Discovery
- **Genes tested**: %d
- **Significant genes (FDR < 0.05)**: %d
- **Selected for modeling**: %d
- **Top gene**: %s (p-value: %.2e)

## Model Performance
| Model | Training C-Index | Test C-Index |
|-------|------------------|--------------|
%s

**Best performing model**: %s (C-index: %.3f)

## Top 10 Prognostic Biomarkers
%s

## Clinical Utility
The best model successfully stratified patients into risk groups:
- **Low risk**: Better survival outcomes
- **Medium risk**: Intermediate survival  
- **High risk**: Poorer survival outcomes

## Recommendations
1. **Validation**: Validate these biomarkers in an independent GBM cohort
2. **Clinical integration**: Consider incorporating top biomarkers into clinical decision-making
3. **Therapeutic targeting**: Investigate therapeutic potential of identified biomarkers
4. **Molecular mechanisms**: Study biological pathways associated with top biomarkers

## Technical Details
- **Duplicate handling**: Advanced TCGA barcode analysis with correlation-based filtering
- **Models trained**: Cox Proportional Hazards, Random Survival Forest, Elastic Net Cox
- **Feature selection**: Univariate Cox regression with multiple testing correction
- **Validation approach**: Independent test set validation with clinical utility assessment

---
*Report generated by GBM CPSM Analysis Pipeline*
',
    Sys.Date(),
    all_results$qc_data$summary$n_samples,
    all_results$qc_data$summary$n_genes,
    all_results$qc_data$summary$n_events,
    all_results$qc_data$summary$median_age,
    all_results$qc_data$summary$median_survival,
    ifelse("removed" %in% names(all_results), 
           all_results$qc_data$summary$n_samples + length(all_results$selected_data$removed),
           all_results$qc_data$summary$n_samples),
    all_results$qc_data$summary$n_samples,
    ifelse("removed" %in% names(all_results), length(all_results$selected_data$removed), 0),
    nrow(all_results$gene_results$all_results),
    nrow(all_results$gene_results$significant),
    nrow(all_results$gene_results$selected),
    all_results$gene_results$selected$Gene[1],
    all_results$gene_results$selected$P_Value[1],
    paste(sprintf("| %s | %.3f | %.3f |", 
                  all_results$model_results$performance$Model,
                  all_results$model_results$performance$Train_C_Index,
                  all_results$model_results$performance$Test_C_Index), 
          collapse = "\n"),
    all_results$model_results$best_model,
    max(all_results$model_results$performance$Test_C_Index),
    paste(sprintf("%d. %s", 1:10, all_results$validation$top_biomarkers[1:10]), 
          collapse = "\n")
  )
  
  writeLines(report_content, file.path(output_dir, "GBM_Analysis_Report.md"))
  
  cat(sprintf("✓ Reports generated in: %s\n", output_dir))
  cat("Files created:\n")
  cat("  - model_performance_summary.csv\n")
  cat("  - top_biomarkers.csv\n") 
  cat("  - gene_discovery_results.csv\n")
  cat("  - GBM_Analysis_Report.md\n")
}


# ========================================================================
# MAIN PIPELINE ORCHESTRATION
# ========================================================================

run_complete_gbm_analysis <- function(data_source = "tcga", 
                                     output_dir = "GBM_CPSM_Results",
                                     n_genes = 100,
                                     test_fraction = 0.3,
                                     skip_checks = FALSE) {
  
  cat("================================================================\n")
  cat("           GBM CPSM ANALYSIS PIPELINE                          \n") 
  cat("================================================================\n")
  cat("Advanced Glioblastoma survival analysis with duplicate handling\n\n")
  
  # System requirements check
  if (!skip_checks) {
    if (!check_system_requirements()) {
      cat("❌ System requirements not met. Use skip_checks=TRUE to override.\n")
      return(NULL)
    }
  }
  
  # Data acquisition
  cat("\n=== STEP 1: DATA ACQUISITION ===\n")
  if (data_source == "tcga") {
    se_data <- download_tcga_gbm_data()
  } else if (data_source == "simulated") {
    se_data <- generate_simulated_data()
  } else {
    stop("Invalid data_source. Use 'tcga' or 'simulated'")
  }
  
  if (is.null(se_data)) {
    cat("❌ Data acquisition failed\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  # Duplicate analysis and sample selection
  cat("\n=== STEP 2: DUPLICATE ANALYSIS ===\n")
  selected_data <- analyze_tcga_duplicates(se_data)
  
  # CPSM format conversion  
  cat("\n=== STEP 3: DATA PREPROCESSING ===\n")
  cpsm_data <- prepare_cpsm_format(selected_data)
  
  # Quality control
  cat("\n=== STEP 4: QUALITY CONTROL ===\n")
  qc_data <- perform_quality_control(cpsm_data)
  
  # Gene discovery
  cat("\n=== STEP 5: GENE DISCOVERY ===\n")
  gene_results <- discover_survival_genes(qc_data, n_genes)
  
  # Model training
  cat("\n=== STEP 6: SURVIVAL MODELING ===\n")
  model_results <- train_survival_models(qc_data, gene_results, test_fraction)
  
  # Biomarker validation
  cat("\n=== STEP 7: BIOMARKER VALIDATION ===\n")
  validation <- validate_biomarkers(model_results, qc_data)
  
  # Comprehensive results
  all_results <- list(
    selected_data = selected_data,
    cpsm_data = cpsm_data,
    qc_data = qc_data,
    gene_results = gene_results,
    model_results = model_results,
    validation = validation,
    parameters = list(
      data_source = data_source,
      n_genes = n_genes,
      test_fraction = test_fraction
    )
  )
  
  # Report generation
  cat("\n=== STEP 8: REPORT GENERATION ===\n")
  generate_comprehensive_report(all_results, output_dir)
  
  cat("\n================================================================\n")
  cat("                   ANALYSIS COMPLETE!                          \n")
  cat("================================================================\n")
  cat(sprintf("Results saved to: %s\n", output_dir))
  cat(sprintf("Best model: %s (C-index: %.3f)\n", 
              model_results$best_model, max(model_results$performance$Test_C_Index)))
  cat(sprintf("Top biomarker: %s\n", validation$top_biomarkers[1]))
  
  return(all_results)
}

# ========================================================================
# UTILITY FUNCTIONS
# ========================================================================

# Quick duplicate analysis for existing data
analyze_existing_data <- function(data_file = NULL) {
  if (is.null(data_file)) {
    cache_files <- list.files(".", pattern = "TCGA.*GBM.*\\.rda", full.names = TRUE)
    if (length(cache_files) == 0) {
      cat("❌ No TCGA data files found\n")
      return(NULL)
    }
    data_file <- cache_files[1]
  }
  
  load(data_file)
  if (!exists("data")) {
    cat("❌ Data file doesn't contain 'data' object\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  return(analyze_tcga_duplicates(data))
}

# Load local data
load_local_data <- function(file_path) {
  if (!file.exists(file_path)) {
    stop("File not found: ", file_path)
  }
  
  if (grepl("\\.rds$", file_path)) {
    return(readRDS(file_path))
  } else if (grepl("\\.RData$", file_path)) {
    load(file_path)
    return(data)  # Assumes object is named 'data'
  } else {
    stop("Unsupported file format. Use .rds or .RData")
  }
}

# ========================================================================
# EXAMPLE USAGE & INSTRUCTIONS  
# ========================================================================

cat("================================================================\n")
cat("    GBM CPSM ANALYSIS PIPELINE SUCCESSFULLY LOADED!            \n")
cat("================================================================\n\n")

cat("🔬 ADVANCED FEATURES:\n")
cat("• Sophisticated TCGA duplicate detection & removal\n") 
cat("• Biological vs technical replicate identification\n")
cat("• Correlation-based technical replicate filtering\n")
cat("• Multiple survival modeling approaches\n")
cat("• Comprehensive biomarker validation\n")
cat("• Automated report generation\n\n")

cat("📊 USAGE EXAMPLES:\n")
cat("==================\n\n")

cat("1. COMPLETE TCGA ANALYSIS (Recommended):\n")
cat("   results <- run_complete_gbm_analysis(data_source = 'tcga')\n\n")

cat("2. TEST WITH SIMULATED DATA:\n")
cat("   results <- run_complete_gbm_analysis(data_source = 'simulated')\n\n")

cat("3. ANALYZE EXISTING DATA:\n")
cat("   duplicates <- analyze_existing_data('TCGA_GBM_data.rda')\n\n")

cat("4. CUSTOM PARAMETERS:\n")
cat("   results <- run_complete_gbm_analysis(\n")
cat("     data_source = 'tcga',\n")
cat("     n_genes = 150,\n") 
cat("     test_fraction = 0.2,\n")
cat("     output_dir = 'My_GBM_Results'\n")
cat("   )\n\n")

cat("5. SKIP SYSTEM CHECKS (if having issues):\n")
cat("   results <- run_complete_gbm_analysis(\n")
cat("     data_source = 'simulated',\n") 
cat("     skip_checks = TRUE\n")
cat("   )\n\n")

cat("🎯 WHAT YOU GET:\n")
cat("================\n")
cat("• model_performance_summary.csv - Model comparison results\n")
cat("• top_biomarkers.csv - Ranked prognostic biomarkers\n")
cat("• gene_discovery_results.csv - Complete gene analysis\n") 
cat("• GBM_Analysis_Report.md - Comprehensive markdown report\n\n")

cat("⚡ QUICK START:\n")
cat("===============\n")
cat("Most users should run:\n")
cat("   results <- run_complete_gbm_analysis()\n\n")

cat("For testing (no TCGA download required):\n") 
cat("   results <- run_complete_gbm_analysis(data_source = 'simulated')\n\n")

cat("Ready to analyze GBM survival data with advanced duplicate handling!\n")
cat("Choose your preferred option above and run the analysis.\n\n")

cat("================================================================\n")
cat("                     PIPELINE READY                            \n")
cat("================================================================\n")
```
